wallet.connectToAccess: Connect your Stellar wallet to access Kora Protocol.
wallet.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure? This will clear your wallet session and redirect from protected pages.
wallet.termsPrefix: By connecting, you agree to our
wallet.connectGuardDesc: This page requires a connected wallet.

landing.headline: Invoice Financing, On-Chain
landing.subtitle: Unlock working capital for emerging market SMEs with on-chain invoice financing, stablecoin liquidity and transparent investor access — all non-custodial.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of SMEs already financing invoices on Kora Protocol.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Five steps from invoice to liquidity
landing.featuresSubtitle: Institutional-grade infrastructure for emerging market SMEs

howItWorks.step1Desc: Connect your Stellar wallet (Freighter, xBull, LOBSTR) to access the protocol.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Upload your unpaid invoice. Metadata is stored on IPFS; the NFT is minted on Soroban.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Set your discount rate and minimum investment. Your invoice goes live instantly.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Investors fund your invoice. USDC is transferred to your wallet immediately.
howItWorks.step5Desc: On due date, repay the financed amount. Investors receive principal + yield.

features.instantDesc: Soroban smart contracts settle transactions in seconds, not days.
features.nonCustodialDesc: Your assets stay in your wallet. Smart contracts hold escrow, not us.
features.globalDesc: SMEs across Africa, Asia, and LatAm access institutional-grade financing.
features.transparentDesc: On-chain risk scores and repayment history visible to all participants.

marketplace.title: Invoice Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Discovering deals...
marketplace.searchPlaceholder: Search by debtor, invoice number, or jurisdiction…
marketplace.activeOnlyDesc: Hide fully funded or defaulted invoices
marketplace.noResultsDesc: We couldn't find any active listings matching your current selection. Try resetting your filters to explore other opportunities.

invoiceDetail.connectToInvest: Connect your Stellar wallet to view yields and start investing.
invoiceDetail.selfFundDesc: You cannot fund your own invoice. Decoupled factoring escrow rules restrict invoice owners from bidding as liquidity providers.
invoiceDetail.cannotFundOwn: You cannot fund your own invoice
invoiceDetail.fullyFundedDesc: This invoice has completed its financing target and is now locked in smart contract escrow.
invoiceDetail.escrowNote: Liquidity deposits are held securely in Soroban escrow smart contracts until repayment is confirmed.
invoiceDetail.documentUnavailableDesc: Unable to load the PDF document.
invoiceDetail.noDocumentDesc: This invoice does not have an attached PDF preview or document URL.

createInvoice.title: Create Invoice
createInvoice.subtitle: Tokenize your invoice and access instant liquidity

fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional details or terms of the invoice...
fields.minInvestmentHint: Smallest amount a single investor can contribute

preview.title: Live Invoice Preview
preview.subtitle: Review the key invoice details as you type.
preview.descriptionPlaceholder: Add a memo or description to summarize the invoice.

upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop your invoice PDF here

errors.tooLarge: File is too large. Max size is exactly 10MB.
errors.invalidType: Invalid file type. Only PDF documents are allowed.
errors.required: Please upload the invoice PDF before minting.

review.title: Review & Mint
review.subtitle: Confirm your invoice details before minting on Soroban

success.title: Invoice Minted!
success.subtitle: Your invoice has been tokenized as an NFT on the Stellar Soroban network and is ready for funding.

createInvoice.discountRateDesc: The discount offered to investors. A higher rate attracts faster funding but increases financing cost.

smeDashboard.title: SME Dashboard
smeDashboard.subtitle: Manage your invoice financing
smeDashboard.connectDesc: Connect to view and manage your invoices
smeDashboard.repaymentDueDesc: You have invoices approaching their repayment date. Ensure sufficient USDC balance.

empty.title: No invoices yet
empty.message: Create your first invoice to start raising liquidity.

investorDashboard.title: Investor Dashboard
investorDashboard.subtitle: Track your invoice financing portfolio
investorDashboard.connectDesc: Connect to view your investment portfolio

empty.title: No positions
empty.message: Fund invoices on the marketplace to build your portfolio.

transactions.subtitle: Your complete on-chain activity on Kora Protocol
transactions.connectDesc: Connect to view your on-chain transaction history
transactions.searchPlaceholder: Search by hash, invoice number, or description…
transactions.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters

empty.title: No transactions yet
empty.description: Your on-chain activity will appear here once you mint, fund, or repay invoices.

analytics.title: Portfolio Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Performance overview of your invoice financing portfolio
analytics.connectDesc: Connect to view your portfolio analytics

cancelDialog.title: Cancel Invoice
cancelDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. The invoice will be permanently cancelled.
cancelDialog.partiallyFundedDesc: This invoice has {amount} in funding. Cancellation is not allowed for partially funded invoices.

effects.markedOnChain: Invoice will be marked as cancelled on-chain
effects.removedMarketplace: It will be removed from the marketplace
effects.ipfsCleanup: IPFS-pinned files will be cleaned up

txSimulation.title: Transaction Preview
txSimulation.subtitle: Review estimated fees and resource usage before signing
txSimulation.simulationErrorDesc: This transaction cannot be executed. Please review the error below.
txSimulation.timeout: Simulation timed out after 10 seconds. Please try again.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.subtitle: Kora Protocol requires an internet connection to interact with the Stellar network. Check your connection and try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or return to the home page.
